title: selaginella rupestris var. tortipila
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. tortipila, also known as a type of spikemoss, is a rare and endemic plant species found in specific regions, characterized by its unique, twisted leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris var. tortipila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
